meaning: n.高速行进的人,高速汽车,超速驾驶者
examples: Cutting corners is generally not good practice, but in an impossible crunch, the half-cup speedster might be the person for the job.
The demotion of Eduardo Nunez has robbed the team of its other primary speedster.
When I began representing professional football players, a receiver who broke into the 4.5 range was considered a speedster.
It's slick, as fast as everything else on this speedster of a phone, and it adds real utility to your day-to-day use.
